pipeline_status.synth_file_playback: WORKING — CC11/CC12 bypass ADSR, mixer fixed for partial volumes

recent_fixes.title: Mixer formula broken at partial volumes
recent_fixes.description: B06 DC-offset formula (out/15 - 0.5) only correct at vol=15. At vol=8 output was 15x too quiet; at vol<8 signal phase-inverted. Fixed with symmetric centering: (2*out - peak)/30.
